extension.summary: Special event streams from iplayer. May break any time.
extension.description: Addon to play special events and red button streams from iplayer.
extension.disclaimer: This add-on is not developed by the BBC and is no way affiliated with, or endorsed by the BBC.
extension.news:
[B]v 2.1.1[/B] - Fixed: add-on failed to open on Matrix. - Allow sorting on title.
[B]v 2.1.0[/B] - Improve item titles and add info. - Use Displaytype 'wide list' by default (on Kodi's default skin).
[B]v 2.0.0[/B] - Only display active streams and optionally enable 1080p and 4k (thanks @caspermcfadden95) - Fix dash streams on Kodi 19 - 21 (Matrix, Nexus, Omega) - Some other improvements and fixes.
